message:
chore(beads): add ephemeral runtime files to .gitignore

Add sync-state.json and last-touched to .gitignore to prevent
these files from being tracked in version control.

- sync-state.json: Created and removed by bd sync during runtime
  to track synchronization backoff state
- last-touched: Ephemeral session identifier file that changes
  on each session, causing unnecessary git noise

These files are transient runtime artifacts that should not be
committed as they vary between development sessions and have no
persistent value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,9 +11,15 @@ daemon.log
 daemon.pid
 bd.sock
 
+# Sync runtime/backoff state (created/removed by bd sync)
+sync-state.json
+
 # Local version tracking (prevents upgrade notification spam after git ops)
 .local_version
 
+# Session touch file (ephemeral session identifier)
+last-touched
+
 # Legacy database files
 db.sqlite
 bd.db
